recording_source._comment: Which dialer the Recording URL column is resolved from. type must be one of: apollo, trellus, manual-url. Remove this whole block (or set type to "") to leave the Recording URL column blank. apollo: use the recording_url Apollo's API attaches to each call. trellus: parse the Trellus session id (a sess_ token) out of the call note and build the link; optional base_url overrides the Trellus recording-URL base. manual-url: use a recording URL you attach per call by hand; optional field overrides the call key the URL lives on (default manual_recording_url).
